hallucination.rationale: All content in the note is directly stated or reasonably inferred from the transcript. No fabricated findings or diagnoses.

instruction_following.rationale: The note follows all template instructions well. Allergies correctly state 'Not documented' when not discussed. Only discussed systems are included in ROS. Social history only includes mentioned items.

completeness.rationale: The note captures most transcript content but misses the kidney labs (microalbumin and creatinine both normal) which were explicitly mentioned.
missed_items: Kidney labs from today are normal — microalbumin and creatinine both fine

template_adherence.rationale: The note follows the template structure well overall. Minor issues: the eye exam finding is placed in ROS/HEENT rather than in HPI or objective findings, and 'Musculoskeletal: Pulses good on feet' is a vascular finding misplaced under musculoskeletal. Vital signs section is appropriately omitted since none were documented.

entity_marking.rationale: Both diabetes and metformin are correctly marked with {{condition:...}} and {{drug:...}} syntax on first occurrence only. Subsequent mentions are not marked.

duplication.rationale: No duplicated sections or repeated content in the note.
